title: Hotfix for Android Login loop
description: Users on Android 14+ are stuck in an infinite OAuth redirect loop after Google login. Reproduced on Samsung Galaxy S24 and Pixel 8. Must ship before Germany conference demo (June 22).

comments.author: Sarah (PM)
comments.text: Blocking demo — treat as P0 until conference.

comments.author: Yossi
comments.text: Root cause: WebView strips state param. Working on bypass.

summary: Task #402: Hotfix for Android Login loop, High Priority, assigned to Yossi Cohen. Due before Germany conference demo.
